story.text: ARCH-1 (April 14) named the canonical form: `Σ := μS.(β ∨ Ω(S,S))` with activation engine `ρ`. That note answered **what can be generated**: the recursive possibility space of a single sufficient operator across three locked domains (Boolean, Continuous, Sovereignty). ARCH-1R/T answers the question the kernel left open: **what happens after possibility is generated.** Once `G`…
*A V6 working research note. Full text: `agentprivacy-docs/research/pvm-v6-arch1rt-operational-reachability.md`.*
